title: ZOUK Bamboo Mattress Protector Double Bed – Waterproof Fitted Cover (135 x 190 + 35 cm) | Breathable, Noiseless & Soft | Double Bed Mattress Protector Waterproof & Hypoallergenic
features: Tailored Fit for Double Beds (135 x 190 + 35cm): Designed to fit UK standard double beds perfectly — deep-pocket fitted skirt stays in place, ideal for mattresses up to 35cm thick.

Waterproof Protection Without the Noise: Features a soft bamboo top layer and silent TPU backing that blocks spills, sweat, and liquids — perfect for kids, guests, or daily use without any crinkling sounds.
Naturally Breathable & Hypoallergenic Bamboo: Bamboo fabric provides excellent airflow, is gentle on skin, and keeps you cool and dry throughout the night — an eco-friendly alternative to polyester.
Easy to Clean & Long-Lasting: Machine washable and dryer safe — maintain freshness with regular washing. Durable elastic edges and waterproof layer remain effective wash after wash.

Reliable Everyday Mattress Protection: This bamboo double bed protector helps extend the life of your mattress by shielding it from spills, moisture, and daily wear — enjoy a fresh, clean, and comfortable sleeping surface every night.
description: Product Description Breathable & Noiseless Our mattress protector is designed to keep you cool and comfortable all night. No matter how much you toss and turn, the protector will not make any noise. So you can sleep soundly and wake up refreshed! 100% Bamboo Surface The 100% bamboo surface is super comfortable and soft. It stops bacteria, mites, and dust from getting into the mattress. Lay into the bed without worrying about allergies or bed bugs. Our protector will keep everything out! 100% Waterproof Made from 100% waterproof material, this protector will keep your mattress free from spills and stains. The mattress protector is perfect for families with young children or pets. Add an extra layer of protection to your mattress! Crinkling-Free Design This bamboo mattress protector stays in its place no matter what happens. It's crinkling-free design prevents wrinkles and creases. Protect your mattress from stains and crinkles with this reliable bamboo mattress protector!
